Bash(cat "/Users/simon.sturgess/Downloads/Features roadmap.rtf" | perl -pe 's/\\\\[a-zA-Z0-9]+\\*?[ ]?//g' | perl -pe 's/[{}]//g' | perl -pe 's/\\s+/ /g' | grep -oE '[a-zA-Z][^}]*' | tail -n +50 | head -200)

Bash(python3 << 'EOFPYTHON'
import re

with open\("/Users/simon.sturgess/Downloads/Features roadmap.rtf", "r"\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Remove RTF controls
text = re.sub\(r'\\\\[a-z]+\\d*[ ]?', '', content\)
# Remove braces
text = re.sub\(r'[{}]', '', text\)
# Clean up multiple spaces
text = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', text\)
# Remove remaining special characters and clean
text = re.sub\(r'[^\\x00-\\x7F]', '', text\)

# Extract meaningful content \(skip the first part which is RTF header\)
lines = text.split\(\)
# Join and print
result = ' '.join\(lines[100:]\)
print\(result[:5000]\)
EOFPYTHON)

Bash(python3 << 'EOFPYTHON'
import re

with open\("/Users/simon.sturgess/Downloads/Features roadmap.rtf", "rb"\) as f:
    raw = f.read\(\)

# Decode
text = raw.decode\('utf-8', errors='ignore'\)

# Find content start
start = text.find\('Features roadmap'\)
if start < 0:
    start = text.find\('roadmap'\)
    if start < 0:
        print\("Could not find content start"\)
        exit\(\)

# Extract from that point
content = text[start:]

# Remove all RTF codes
cleaned = re.sub\(r'\\\\[a-zA-Z0-9\\-]+\\*?', '', content\)
cleaned = re.sub\(r'[{}]', '', cleaned\)
cleaned = re.sub\(r'\\*[a-zA-Z0-9\\.]+', '', cleaned\)
cleaned = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', cleaned\)

# Extract until we hit the style definitions
end_markers = ['Normal;heading', 'caption;Title', 'Subtle Emphasis']
for marker in end_markers:
    pos = cleaned.find\(marker\)
    if pos > 0:
        cleaned = cleaned[:pos]
        break

print\(cleaned.strip\(\)\)
EOFPYTHON)
